title: isodon shikokianus var. shikokianus
intro: Isodon shikokianus var. shikokianus, also known as Shikoku Japanese sage or Japanese mountain mint, is a plant species in the Lamiaceae family. This plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective against various health issues. The health benefits of Isodon shikokianus var. shikokianus include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing fever and relieving pain. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures for consumption, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine and Japanese herbalism.
